description: Languages 7-10 (Second Language Entry pathway) capability progression map. Same sub-strand structure as F-10 pathway — codes use EC suffix indicating entry at Y7.
subject: Languages

_notes.ec_suffix: EC codes indicate the 7-10 Entry/Commencement pathway for students beginning the target language at Year 7. Sub-strand structure is identical to F-10 pathway.
_notes.placeholder_note: Labels use 'the target language' so the file can be reused across languages. Keep ACARA codes unchanged unless your renderer explicitly supports code substitution.
_notes.interacting_y78: Y7-8 has 3 interacting codes vs 2 in F-10 pathway — broader scaffolding for late starters.

standards.title: Exchange information in familiar contexts
standards.description: interact with others using modelled language to exchange information in familiar contexts about self and personal worlds
standards.capability_goal: Students interact using modelled language to exchange information about self and personal worlds.

standards.title: Develop language for classroom exchanges
standards.description: develop language to interact in exchanges, routines, tasks and responsibilities related to classroom and interests
standards.capability_goal: Students develop language for exchanges, routines and responsibilities related to classroom and interests.

standards.title: Organise activities with peers
standards.description: engage in modelled non-verbal, spoken and written exchanges with peers to organise activities relating to daily life and school environment
standards.capability_goal: Students engage in modelled exchanges with peers to organise activities relating to daily life and school.

standards.title: Locate and process information in texts
standards.description: locate and process information and ideas in familiar spoken, written and multimodal texts, responding in ways appropriate to cultural context, purpose and audience
standards.capability_goal: Students locate and process information in familiar texts, responding appropriately to cultural context and audience.

standards.title: Interpret and convey meaning in the target language
standards.description: develop and begin to apply strategies to interpret, translate and convey meaning in the target language in familiar contexts
standards.capability_goal: Students develop and begin to apply strategies to interpret, translate and convey meaning in familiar contexts.

standards.title: Create informative and imaginative texts
standards.description: create spoken, written and multimodal, informative and imaginative texts using appropriate vocabulary, expressions, grammatical structures, and some textual conventions
standards.capability_goal: Students create spoken, written and multimodal texts using appropriate vocabulary, structures and some conventions.

standards.title: Target language sound system
standards.description: recognise and use features of the target language sound system, including pitch, rhythm, stress, pronunciation and intonation, and demonstrate understanding of how these are represented in familiar contexts
standards.capability_goal: Students recognise and use features of the target language sound system including pitch, rhythm, stress and intonation.

standards.title: Grammar and writing systems
standards.description: develop knowledge of, and use structures and features of, the target language grammatical and writing systems to understand and create spoken, written and multimodal texts
standards.capability_goal: Students develop knowledge of target language grammatical and writing systems to understand and create texts.

standards.title: Compare the target language and English
standards.description: compare target language structures and features with English, using familiar metalanguage
standards.capability_goal: Students compare target language structures and features with English using familiar metalanguage.

standards.title: Identity shaped by language and culture
standards.description: recognise how identity is shaped by language(s), culture(s), attitudes, beliefs and values
standards.capability_goal: Students recognise how identity is shaped by languages, cultures, attitudes, beliefs and values.

standards.title: Sustain interactions in varied contexts
standards.description: initiate and sustain interactions in familiar and some unfamiliar contexts to exchange ideas, opinions and experiences about their own and others' personal worlds
standards.capability_goal: Students initiate and sustain interactions in familiar and some unfamiliar contexts to exchange ideas and experiences.

standards.title: Question, compare and discuss ideas
standards.description: use the target language in exchanges to question, offer opinions and compare and discuss ideas
standards.capability_goal: Students use the target language to question, offer opinions and compare and discuss ideas.

standards.title: Discuss and reflect with peers
standards.description: use non-verbal, spoken and written exchanges to discuss, plan and reflect on activities, events and experiences with peers
standards.capability_goal: Students use exchanges to discuss, plan and reflect on activities, events and experiences with peers.

standards.title: Interpret across a wide range of texts
standards.description: interpret information, ideas and perspectives in a wide range of spoken, written and multimodal texts and respond appropriately to cultural context, purpose and audience
standards.capability_goal: Students interpret information and perspectives in a wide range of texts and respond appropriately to context.

standards.title: Interpret and translate for intercultural understanding
standards.description: apply strategies to interpret and translate non-verbal, spoken and written interactions and texts to convey meaning and intercultural understanding in familiar and unfamiliar contexts
standards.capability_goal: Students apply strategies to interpret and translate texts to convey meaning and intercultural understanding.

standards.title: Create texts for diverse audiences
standards.description: create spoken, written and multimodal, informative and imaginative texts, selecting vocabulary, expressions, grammatical structures and textual conventions for familiar and some unfamiliar contexts and purposes, to engage different audiences
standards.capability_goal: Students create texts selecting vocabulary, structures and conventions for varied contexts to engage different audiences.

standards.title: Apply target language sound system
standards.description: apply features of the target language sound system, including pitch, rhythm, stress, pronunciation and intonation, and show how these are represented in familiar and some unfamiliar contexts
standards.capability_goal: Students apply features of the target language sound system in familiar and some unfamiliar contexts.

standards.title: Select grammar to enhance meaning
standards.description: select and use structures and features of the target language grammatical and writing systems to enhance meaning and create spoken, written and multimodal texts
standards.capability_goal: Students select and use target language grammatical and writing systems to enhance meaning and create texts.

standards.title: Evaluate texts using metalanguage
standards.description: reflect on and evaluate target language texts, using metalanguage to discuss language structures and features
standards.capability_goal: Students reflect on and evaluate target language texts using metalanguage to discuss structures and features.

standards.title: Evaluate identity and communication
standards.description: reflect on and explain how identity is shaped by language(s), culture(s), attitudes, beliefs and values, and how these affect ways of communicating
standards.capability_goal: Students reflect on and explain how identity shaped by languages and cultures affects ways of communicating.

capability_threads.description: Languages 7-10 Entry pathway capability sequences. Sub-strand structure matches F-10 pathway.

communicating.label: Communicating meaning in the target language

mediating.label: Mediating meaning in and between languages

creating.label: Creating text in the target language

understanding_culture.label: Understanding the interrelationship of language and culture
